name: Carnation Basic Muffin Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Carnation Instant Skim Milk Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Store the mixture in a dry place in a sealed container for up to 6 months.
NOTE: see recipe for Apple n' Spice Muffins
Source: Carnation Instant Skim Milk Powder Leaflet
From the collection of K. Deck
